name: @werk1/w1-system-articleblock
description: Article block renderers for W1 System

scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'if command -v tsc >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json; elif [ -x ../w1-system-core-v2/node_modules/.bin/tsc ]; then ../w1-system-core-v2/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json; else echo "TypeScript compiler not found. Run npm install in this package or install dependencies in ../w1-system-core-v2." >&2; exit 127; fi'
